Interface OrdersManager

All Known Implementing Classes:
JDBCOrdersManager
public interface OrdersManager
Interface defining operations for managing orders.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    createOrder(Order order)
    Creates a new order in the system.
    boolean
    deleteOrder(String orderId)
    Deletes an order from the system.
    Order
    findOrderById(String orderId)
    Finds an order by its ID.
    List<Order>
    getAllOrders()
    Retrieves all orders in the system.
    boolean
    updateOrderStatus(String orderId, String status)
    Updates the status of an existing order.

  • Method Details

    • createOrder

      boolean createOrder(Order order)
      Creates a new order in the system.
      Parameters:
      order - the order object to create
      Returns:
      true if the order was successfully created, false otherwise

    • findOrderById

      Order findOrderById(String orderId)
      Finds an order by its ID.
      Parameters:
      orderId - the ID of the order
      Returns:
      the order object if found, null otherwise

    • getAllOrders

      List<Order> getAllOrders()
      Retrieves all orders in the system.
      Returns:
      a list of all orders

    • updateOrderStatus

      boolean updateOrderStatus(String orderId, String status)
      Updates the status of an existing order.
      Parameters:
      orderId - the ID of the order to update
      status - the new status to set
      Returns:
      true if the status was successfully updated, false otherwise

    • deleteOrder

      boolean deleteOrder(String orderId)
      Deletes an order from the system.
      Parameters:
      orderId - the ID of the order to delete
      Returns:
      true if the order was successfully deleted, false otherwise
